nasb.text: The God and Father of the Lord Jesus, He who is blessed forever, knows that I am not lying.

esv.text: The God and Father of the Lord Jesus, he who is blessed forever, knows that I am not lying.

cnv.text: 主耶穌的父　神是應當永遠受稱頌的，他知道我沒有說謊。

ccb.text: 主耶稣的父——永受称颂的上帝知道我不撒谎。

csbs.text: 主耶稣的神与父——永远当受颂赞的那一位，知道我不是在说谎。
